faqs.question: How long does the website development process take?
faqs.answer: It depends on the package you choose, but generally 2–4 weeks from the initial consultation to the website going live.

faqs.question: Can I update the content myself?
faqs.answer: Yes! We provide an easy-to-use CMS so you can update content without any coding knowledge.

faqs.question: Do you offer post-launch support?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! We provide technical support and maintenance after launch to make sure your website keeps running smoothly.

faqs.question: What sets Levana apart from other agencies?
faqs.answer: We focus on strategic personal branding, not just pretty design. Every element is crafted to build trust and drive conversions.

faqs.question: Are the websites mobile-friendly?
faqs.answer: Every website we build is fully responsive and optimized for all devices — desktop, tablet, and mobile.
